terms_of_service.title: Terms of Service
terms_of_service.description: Comprehensive terms and conditions for using Maestro's AI-powered content orchestration platform.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Maestro ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. Maestro is an AI-powered content orchestration platform that helps users create, manage, and deploy content across social media platforms.

service_description.title: 2. Description of Service
service_description.content: Maestro provides an AI-driven platform for content creation and management, including:

features.ai_content: AI-powered content generation for social media platforms
features.multi_platform: Multi-platform content distribution (Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)
features.comment_analysis: Comment analysis and automated response generation
features.trend_analysis: Trend analysis and creative content suggestions

items.law_compliance: Ensuring all content created through the Service complies with applicable laws and platform policies
items.security: Maintaining the security of your account credentials
items.content_review: Reviewing and approving all AI-generated content before publishing
items.ip_respect: Respecting intellectual property rights of others
items.legal_compliance: Using the Service in compliance with local, state, national, and international laws

ai_content.title: 4. AI-Generated Content
ai_content.content: While Maestro uses advanced AI to generate content suggestions, you acknowledge that:

items.editorial_control: You maintain full editorial control and responsibility for all published content
items.inaccuracies: AI-generated content may contain inaccuracies or inappropriate material
items.review_required: You must review, edit, and approve all content before publishing
items.liability: Maestro is not liable for the accuracy, appropriateness, or legality of AI-generated content

data_privacy.title: 5. Data and Privacy
data_privacy.content: Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. We collect and process data necessary to provide our services, including content you create, usage patterns, and technical information.

intellectual_property.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectual_property.content: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of Maestro and its licensors. The Service is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws.

service_availability.title: 7. Service Availability
service_availability.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service at any time. We may also impose limits on certain features or restrict access to parts of the Service.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Maestro shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for the Service in the twelve months preceding the claim.

terms_changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
terms_changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified Terms.

contact.title: 10. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at the email provided in our contact information.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.description: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information when using Maestro's AI content services.

information_collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
information_collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, information we obtain automatically when you use our Service, and information from third-party sources.

items.profile_info: Profile information you choose to provide
items.content_created: Content you create, edit, or publish through our Service

items.usage_data: Usage data (how you interact with our Service)
items.device_info: Device information (IP address, browser type, operating system)
items.log_data: Log data (actions taken within the Service)

items.social_media: Social media platform data when you connect accounts
items.analytics: Analytics data from our service providers

information_usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
information_usage.content: We use the collected information to:

items.service_provision: Provide, maintain, and improve our AI-powered content orchestration services
items.content_processing: Process and fulfill your content creation requests
items.ai_generation: Generate AI-powered content suggestions and analysis
items.account_management: Manage your account and provide customer support
items.communication: Communicate with you about updates, features, and promotions
items.usage_analysis: Monitor usage patterns and analyze trends

ai_machine_learning.title: 3. AI and Machine Learning
ai_machine_learning.content: To provide our AI-powered features, we process your content through our machine learning models:

items.model_training: Content you create or edit may be used to train and improve our AI models
items.usage_analysis: We may analyze usage patterns to enhance our services
items.aggregated_data: AI-generated content is based on patterns learned from aggregated data
items.safeguards: We implement safeguards to protect your personal information during AI processing

information_sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing and Disclosure
information_sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

items.service_providers: With service providers who assist in our operations (under strict confidentiality agreements)
items.legal_requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights
items.business_transfer: In connection with a business transfer or acquisition
items.safety_security: To protect the safety and security of our users and the public

data_security.title: 5. Data Security
data_security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

data_retention.title: 6. Data Retention
data_retention.content: We retain your information for as long as necessary to provide our services and fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy. You may request deletion of your data as described in our Data Deletion Policy.

user_rights.title: 7. Your Rights and Choices
user_rights.content: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, analyze usage, and provide personalized content. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.

third_party_services.title: 9. Third-Party Services
third_party_services.content: Our Service may contain links to third-party websites or integrate with third-party services. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of these third parties.

policy_changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
policy_changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or through our Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at the email provided in our contact information.

data_deletion_policy.title: Data Deletion Policy
data_deletion_policy.description: Your rights and our procedures for deleting your personal data from Maestro's systems.

deletion_right.title: 1. Your Right to Deletion
deletion_right.content: You have the right to request the deletion of your personal information that we have collected and stored. This right is subject to certain exceptions and limitations as outlined in applicable privacy laws, including but not limited to GDPR, CCPA, and other relevant regulations.

deletable_information.title: 2. Information Subject to Deletion
deletable_information.content: The following types of information may be deleted upon your request:

items.created_content: Content you have created or uploaded to the Service
items.communications: Communication records with our support team
items.preferences: Preferences and settings associated with your account

deletion_exceptions.title: 3. Exceptions to Deletion
deletion_exceptions.content: We may retain certain information even after your deletion request in the following cases:

items.legal_compliance: Information required for legal compliance or regulatory requirements
items.transaction_completion: Data necessary to complete transactions or provide services you have requested
items.security_incidents: Information needed to detect security incidents or prevent fraud
items.legal_claims: Data required for exercising or defending legal claims
items.anonymized_data: Information that has been anonymized or aggregated (cannot be traced back to you)

request_methods.title: 4. How to Request Data Deletion
request_methods.content: You can request deletion of your data through the following methods:

steps.login: Log in to your Maestro account

support_email.title: Method 2: Contact Our Support Team
support_email.content: Send an email to our support team at the contact email provided on our website with the subject line "Data Deletion Request". Please include your account email address and a clear statement that you wish to delete your data.

verification.title: 5. Verification Process
verification.content: To protect your privacy and security, we will verify your identity before processing deletion requests. This may involve confirming your email address, providing additional identification information, or answering security questions.

processing_time.title: 6. Processing Time
processing_time.content: We will process your deletion request within 30 days of receiving and verifying it. In some cases, particularly when dealing with large amounts of data or complex systems, this process may take up to 90 days. We will notify you once the deletion is complete.

ai_training_data.title: 7. AI Model Training Data
ai_training_data.content: Please note that if your content has been used to train our AI models, complete removal from training datasets may not be possible. However, we will remove any personally identifiable information and take steps to prevent your content from influencing future AI outputs.

third_party_services.title: 8. Third-Party Services
third_party_services.content: If your account is connected to third-party services (social media platforms, etc.), you may need to separately request data deletion from those services. We will delete any data we have obtained from these third parties, but cannot delete data held directly by them.

backup_recovery.title: 9. Data Backup and Recovery
backup_recovery.content: Deleted data may remain in our backup systems for up to 6 months before being permanently removed. These backups are encrypted and used only for disaster recovery purposes.

account_vs_data.title: 10. Account Deletion vs Data Deletion
account_vs_data.content: Requesting account deletion will automatically trigger deletion of your personal data. However, you may also request deletion of specific data while keeping your account active. Please specify your preference when making the request.

deletion_reversal.title: 11. Reversal of Deletion
deletion_reversal.content: Once your data has been deleted, it cannot be recovered. If you wish to use our Service again after deletion, you will need to create a new account and start fresh.

policy_changes.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
policy_changes.content: We may update this Data Deletion Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or through our Service.

contact.title: 13. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Data Deletion Policy or need assistance with a deletion request, please contact us at the email provided in our contact information.

landing.hero_title: Your Own Orchestra for Content Propagation
landing.hero_description: Maestro helps you create, manage, and deploy domain-adapted content with a seamless chat-first workflow.

chat_section.title: 1. Chat with Maestro
chat_section.user_message_1: Generate a social media campaign for our new eco-friendly product line.

chat_section.user_message_2: Let's go with a positive, engaging tone. Use #EcoInnovate and #SustainableFuture.

orchestration_section.card_1_description: AI generates content for all platforms.

collaboration_section.title: 4. Automated Collaboration Pipeline
collaboration_section.card_1_description: AI analyzes user comments and feedback.
collaboration_section.card_2_description: Maestro drafts and posts relevant replies.

hero.title: Publish through Maestro. Replicating your judgment.
hero.subtitle: A single judgment becomes the brand's memory, and that memory makes the next decision.
hero.cta_subtitle: Try Maestro Beta — Free for Early Users

problem.title: Are you re-judging, re-writing, and re-editing every time?
problem.body_1: There are many marketing automation tools, but none of them "remember you."
problem.body_2: They forget today's tone tomorrow, and fail to apply yesterday's performance to this campaign.
problem.body_3: Maestro records and reproduces your judgment. Without losing the brand's rhythm.

what_is_maestro.title: The Intelligent Orchestra that Conducts Your Brand
what_is_maestro.body_1: Maestro is not just an automation tool. It is an engine that connects your judgment and actions into a single system.
what_is_maestro.body_2: Every publication, revision, and analysis operates under a single command, and the result of each becomes the basis for the next action.

core_components.title: Four engines conduct your judgment.
core_components.subtitle: Humans judge, and the system repeats that judgment.

persona.title: Persona
persona.description: The ego that remembers the brand's voice, tone, and forbidden words.

playbook.title: Playbook
playbook.description: The memory that learns from actions and results, leaving them as insights.

orchestrator.title: Orchestrator
orchestrator.description: The conductor that executes all actions deterministically.

coworker.title: CoWorker
coworker.description: The colleague who continues the routine even in your absence.

experience.title: "Ctrl + K" Wherever you type, Maestro is with you at that moment.
experience.item_1: With a single key, you can recall the current persona, past records, and trend data.
experience.item_2: It suggests a draft while remembering your tone and rhythm.
experience.item_3: When a trend is detected, CoWorker automatically suggests a draft.
experience.item_4: With your single approval, it is published perfectly tailored for all platforms.
experience.quote: "Maestro doesn't write for me, it plays my rhythm for me."

how_it_works.title: A single action becomes a routine.
how_it_works.subtitle: This loop constantly replicates and refines your judgment.

2.title: 2. Generate
2.description: Persona and Playbook construct the guidelines.

insight.title: Judgment is verified by data, and data returns to judgment.
insight.body: A/B testing, automatic KPI aggregation, comment reaction collection — all results are recorded in the Playbook to evolve the brand's judgment algorithm.
insight.image_caption: Playbook Dashboard Screenshot + "Engagement ↑104% with warm tone"

philosophy.title: Automation that remembers.
philosophy.body_1: Maestro does not replace human judgment. Instead, it ensures that judgment is not repeated from scratch every time.
philosophy.body_2: Technology remembers your rhythm, and the brand grows on that memory.
philosophy.body_3: This is not automation, but the ethics of replication.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.quote_1: "This isn't AI, it's a system that remembers for me."
testimonials.quote_2: "My brand started speaking before I did."

cta.title: Replicate your judgment.
cta.subtitle: Today's action becomes tomorrow's intelligence. Start building your brand's memory with Maestro.

use_cases.section_description: From a single command to a fully automated workflow, see how Maestro replicates your judgment.

publishing_flow.title: From a Single Command to Multi-Platform Content
publishing_flow.description: Issue a command in plain language. Maestro's Orchestrator understands the intent, gathers context, and generates ready-to-publish drafts for all your channels.

chat.user_message: Get trends for #VintageTech and create a new draft!
chat.bot_thinking: Understood. Analyzing trends and your Persona...
chat.bot_response: I've found a rising trend in #VintageTech. Based on your Persona, I've compiled drafts for Threads and Instagram.

draft_card.threads_content: Remember this? The classics are back! What was your first gaming console? 🕹️ #VintageTech #RetroGaming
draft_card.instagram_content: That feeling of nostalgia hits different. We're diving into the world of #VintageTech. What classic gadget do you miss the most?

reactive_automation.title: Set a Rule Once, Automate Forever
reactive_automation.description: The Reactive Engine works 24/7. Define a rule, and Maestro's Synchro worker will monitor comments and trigger actions, with every response quality-checked by your Persona.

interaction.comment_text: This looks amazing! How much is it?
interaction.bot_reply_text: Thanks for asking! You can find all pricing details on our website. We've also applied a 10% discount for you: [link]

brand_memory.title: Your Judgment, Recorded and Refined
brand_memory.description: The Playbook is your brand's memory. It records the full context of every action, learns from the results, and helps your CoWorker make smarter decisions.

how_to_get_started.title: How to Get Started
how_to_get_started.description: Follow these steps to teach Maestro your brand's unique rhythm and unlock its full potential.

1.title: Define Your Persona
1.description: Create a Persona to set your brand’s unique voice, tone, and rules. This is the soul of your content.

2.title: Connect Your Channels
2.description: Securely connect your social media accounts like Instagram and Threads.

3.title: Link Persona to Account
3.description: Assign a specific Persona to each connected account. You can use different voices for different channels.

4.title: Activate Your CoWorker
4.description: Enable your AI CoWorker to start performing autonomous tasks, like generating drafts and publishing scheduled content based on your Persona.

how_to_get_started.final_note: Once set up, all actions become part of a seamless, organic workflow.
